items.headline_en: n8n release feed now shows n8n@2.18.4
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for n8n changed and the newest visible tag is n8n@2.18.4. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-27T09:45:55Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
